name: Returned Dino Daneen
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by a monster effect: You can add 1 "GMX" monster from your Deck to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Dinosaur Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY: You can make all Dinosaur monsters you currently control gain 400 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Returned Dino Daneen" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by a monster effect: You can add 1 "GMX" monster from your Deck to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Dinosaur Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY: You can make all Dinosaur monsters you currently control gain 400 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Returned Dino Daneen" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Special Summoned by a monster effect: You can add 1 "GMX" monster from your Deck to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can Fusion Summon 1 Dinosaur Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If this card is sent to the GY: You can make all Dinosaur monsters you currently control gain 400 ATK. You can only use each effect of "Returned Dino Daneen" once per turn.

action: Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
